name: Complete Laundry System
description: A comprehensive laundry system covering detergent, softening, drying, and stain treatment using alkaline salts, bar soap, and targeted oxidizers.
replaces: Detergent + softener + dryer sheets + stain removers ($0.50+/load)
effectivenessNote: Good for everyday laundry. Commercial has edge on heavy soil via enzyme blends. DIY matches/beats for: odor removal, softening, cost. Ammonia option excels on workwear.
warnings: Cannot match commercial enzymes (protease, lipase) for set-in stains
Bar soap residue in HE machines — use fine powder, 1 tbsp max
Ammonia: harsh fumes, destroys wool/silk, NEVER with bleach
Dissolves slower in cold water — warm/hot water recommended
scienceNote: Commercial = surfactants (soap) + softeners (borax/soda) + buffers (baking soda) + enzymes (no DIY match) + brighteners (unnecessary) + fragrance (unnecessary). You cover 4/7, skip 3 unnecessary. Enzymes are the one genuine gap.
